## LibraryRuntime.ProducedFilling.undo() method

Undoes the last change. Pops from undo stack, pushes current to redo, and restores previous state.

**Signature:**

```typescript
undo(): Result<boolean>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;boolean&gt;

Success with true if undo succeeded, Success with false if no history
